BACKEND: /api/connections/platforms returns stores and ads platforms

verified_features.verification: Public endpoint (no auth required) returns 7 signals, 6 data sources, formula, confidence_levels, and 5 honest_limitations
Component renders with data-testid='data-trust-banner', shows 'Your data is sourced from real platforms' with platform names, expandable to show 4 data source cards

Component renders after SupplierSection with data-testid='scoring-methodology', shows 'How Our Scores Work' title, expandable to show 7 signals with what_high_means/what_low_means, and honest limitations section
Shopify/WooCommerce show 'Full Automation' badge, Etsy/BigCommerce/Squarespace show 'Manual Import' badge
Meta/TikTok show 'Auto-Post Ads' badge, Google Ads shows 'Draft Only' badge
'Launch a Product in 3 Clicks' section visible on dashboard with 3-step flow
'Live data · Last updated' timestamp visible on dashboard
